subject: Re: Issues with denoising
body:
Hi Cyan,

Did you update the GPU drivers on that system when you installed 1.1.0? I 
think that's the most common issue so far. It might also be best to remove 
1.0.9 just in case.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, October 6, 2022 at 2:03:21 AM UTC-7 xingyichen...@gmail.com 
wrote:

> Dear Dimitry,
>
> Thank you so much for the updates! 
>
> When using Warp 1.0.9, we had the following error in denoising:
>
> Unhandled Exception: System.Runtime.InteropServices.SEHException: External 
> component has thrown an exception at Warp.GPU.Rotate3DExtractAt(UInt64 
> t_volume, int3 dimsvolume, IntPte d_proj, int3 dimsproj, Single[] 
> h_positions, UInt32 batch) at Noise2Map.Program.Main(String[] args)
>
> GPU: Quadro RTX 6000
>
> Command: noise2map --observation1 even --observation2 odd --angpix 3.4 
> --batchsize 4 --dont_flatten_spectrum true --iterations 10000 
> --dont_augment true --gpuid_preprocess 0 --gpuid_network 0
>
> Now that we installed the beta version, we are starting to have the 
> following error:
>
> Unhandled exception. System.Exception: cudaErrorInvalidConfiguration
>    at Warp.GPU.CheckGPUExceptions()
>    at Noise2Map.Noise2Map.Main(String[] args)
>
> Do you maybe have suggestions on how to fix these issues?
>
> Thank you so much for your help!
>
> Cheers,
>
> Cyan Ching
>
> PhD student
>
> The Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
>
